title: AIIMS Patna Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 45 Senior Resident Posts
description: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Patna (AIIMS Patna) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 45 Senior Resident Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MD/MS, DNB, and Post-graduation can apply for the AIIMS Patna Jobs 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit,...
